title: Property Development II
outline: This course aims to develop an understanding of: the role of property development in property markets; theories of property development; computer software programmes in conjunction with feasibility and viability studies; researching markets for property developments; the development of residential units; the development of commercial units; marketing of property developments; and financing property developments.
lecture_times: See departmental timetable and official class schedule.
dp_requirements: Please refer to the official course handout document for detailed information regarding the DP requirements for this course.
assessment: Please refer to the official course handout document regarding the assessment criteria for this course.
